tasks.body_preview: - state_run_incomplete_count=1 (graph pressure): at least one past session emitted RunStarted/SessionStarted but never emitted the session-level RunCompleted because the script exited early via `set -euo pipefail` (line 22) before reaching the RunCompleted at line 3351. - Log feedback corrected lesson #1: "state run lifecycle was incomplete: state_incomplete
tasks.expected_evidence: Future sessions show state_run_incomplete_count=0 in trajectory. Dashboard lifecycle views no longer show open_after_SessionStarted. The EXIT trap fires and records RunCompleted even when the script is killed or exits early. tasks.title: Ensure session RunCompleted fires on all exit paths (EXIT trap)
